title: カイチョーみたいな勝負服

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I head for Tokai Teio's classroom to let
her know about an adjustment to the day's
training location...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ah, hello. Teio, you've got a visitor.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer!
choice_data_list: Why are you in your racewear?
Why are you in your racewear?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking I could train like it's a real race
today!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
She flew out of the room as soon as class ended.
Gave our teacher a real fright.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And she was yelling, "My racewear is calling
me!" ♪ She sure loves those clothes, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Of course! After all...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huzzah! Guess what, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm finally gonna have my very own racewear!
choice_data_list:
I guess you'll need to come up with a design,
then.

I guess you'll need to come up with a design,
then.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I wanna include something that matches
Prez's outfit!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hm, what kinda design should I use? I really want some oomph in it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, ooh! That'll show off my majesty, just like
Prez!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Prez is always cool, but she's like ten times as
cool when she's wearing her signature racewear!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her in the winner's circle waving to the
crowd, cravat fluttering in the wind...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
She looks just like a real emperor! That's when I
knew I wanted to be just like her!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I finished the design! ♪ Ahhh, I wanna run
in it already!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And here's the finished product! Isn't it so
majestic? ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
This racewear is proof that I'm gonna be just like
Prez was back then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... If you truly wish to look majestic, you ought to have a bit more composure.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You must act more modestly, as befits your noble
lineage.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, stop with the old-fashioned schtick! I'm
going to be majestic in my own way!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
For starters, I'm gonna train super hard today,
and then―

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Found you, Teio.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You come straight back to the student council
office this instant and clean up the mess you
made with your games and snacks!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I-I'll do that later! Today's the day I run just like
Prez in my new racewear! I've been itching to get
out there since―

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Well, you can run around as much as you like
while you clean. And I'm sure the president will be
more than happy to watch you do it.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! I don't wanna!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can even tell her about the new training
location, Tokai Teio is dragged away by Air
Groove.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It appears she has a long way to go before she
can be called "majestic."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In any case, her signature racewear seems to be a
positive influence on her.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
A cape sounds great! Oh, and I could use that
cool design she has on her sleeves, too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Of course, the cape's gotta be bright red, just like
Prez's!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I finished the design! ♪ Ahhh, I wanna run
in it already!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: And here's the finished product!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, sick cape. Maybe I'll try one on for my next
run.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: You're so easy to influence...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Am not!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You can't blame her. Who wouldn't want one of
these?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Prez sprinting like the wind on the turf, her cape
fluttering behind her...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
One look and I was a goner. My heart couldn't
stop racing for, like, ever!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
This racewear symbolizes my dream to become
like that someday!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All eyes on me, hearts pounding as they watch me
run...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Before you start daydreaming, how about you
clean up the mess you made in the student
council office with your games and snacks?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ack! Air Groove?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
In fact, I'll be so kind as to fulfill your wish. I'll be
keeping my eyes on you for the entire duration of
your cleaning duties.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Nooo! Not like thiiis!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can even tell her about the new training
location, Tokai Teio is dragged away by Air
Groove.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: That's one way to get eyes on you.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Haha! You're not wrong!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In any case, her signature racewear seems to be a
positive influence on her.
